request_payload.exposure_text: As a senior citizen who remembers the Cold War, I worry about weakening our alliances. Some politicians say we should reduce commitments to save money, but what about our safety? North Korea just tested another missile - do we really want to gamble with our grandchildren's security? Our alliances keep us strong without sending troops everywhere. #NationalSecurity #AlliancesMatter
